intentSynonyms: show me my section groups in onenote
view my section groups in onenote
see all my section groups in onenote
list section groups in a notebook or across all notebooks in onenote
description: List OneNote section groups. When a notebook_id is provided, returns section groups in that notebook. Otherwise returns all section groups across all notebooks. Section groups are folders that organize sections within a notebook.

notebook_id.description: Notebook ID to list section groups for. Omit to list all section groups.

top.description: Maximum number of section groups to return (default 20, max 100)
